name: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month, manual payroll adjustments cause errors and delays. We automate payroll adjustments instead of manual tracking.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month
problem_solved: Manual payroll adjustments lead to errors and delays.

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual payroll adjustments lead to errors and delays.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month, manual payroll adjustments cause errors and delays. We automate payroll adjustments instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and adjustment of payroll based on time-off requests.

one_liner: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month, manual payroll adjustments cause errors and delays. We automate payroll adjustments instead of manual tracking.
